---
title: "Directory Migration — AD Infrastructure Bridge"
subtitle: "Everything AD Was Holding Together"
---

## The Problem

Active Directory was not just an identity store. It was the implicit governance
model for DNS, DHCP, PKI, RADIUS, LDAP, GPO device policy, file services, and
trust relationships.

## Adapter Interfaces

| ID | Adapter | Priority |
|----|---------|----------|
| DM_010 | IPAM (InfoBlox / BlueCat) | HIGH |
| DM_020 | PKI / Certificate Services | CRITICAL |
| DM_030 | RADIUS / 802.1X / VPN | CRITICAL |
| DM_040 | LDAP Proxy | CRITICAL |
| DM_050 | Sync Engine (Entra Connect) | HIGH |
| DM_060 | Device Management | HIGH |
| DM_070 | NTP / Time Services | MEDIUM |
| DM_080 | DFS / File Services | MEDIUM |

::: {.callout-important}
PKI, RADIUS, and LDAP are CRITICAL — silent failures that don't surface
until something breaks in production.
:::

::: {.callout-note}
Source files: `src/uiao/modernization/directory-migration/`
:::
